news.t: Wedbush Launches Core ETF in Partnership with Indiggo Making Corporate Leadership Outcomes Investable

holdings.infoBox: EXEQ is an equity ETF with a total of 51 individual holdings. The top holdings are Cadence Design Systems stock at 4.77%, Delta Air Lines at 4.61%, Western Digital at 4.40%, United Airlines Holdings at 4.32%, and Motorola Solutions at 3.87%.

overview.description: The Wedbush ReturnOnLeadership U.S. Large-Cap ETF (EXEQ) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in large cap equity. The fund tracks an index comprised of 50 US large-cap equities selected based on a proprietary leadership composite score. The index ranks firms across four leadership fundamentals using a structured data and AI-based assessment framework. EXEQ was launched on Feb 13, 2026 and is issued by Wedbush.
infoTable: Solactive Indiggo Return on Leadership U.S. Large-Cap Index

data.title: Wedbush Launches Core ETF in Partnership with Indiggo Making Corporate Leadership Outcomes Investable
data.text: PASADENA, Calif., Feb. 13, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Wedbush Fund Advisers LLC , in partnership with Indiggo LLC , launched the Wedbush ReturnOnLeadership® U.S. Large-Cap ETF (Ticker: EXEQ), a research...
